phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q-shield the poke and last-hit with W refunds — you are pre-paying for level 16; act like it.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Survive. The shield eats one spell per trade — make it his important one and concede the rest.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Anivia's wall-frost poke control own this window — your void-shield scaling don't answer them at level 3 yet. Farm what's safe and let the next spike re-price the lane.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Respect window: through levels 4-5 the wall-frost poke control beat your void-shield scaling cleanly. Trade only off Anivia's cooldowns and keep the wave where the lead can't cash out.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Anivia's wall-frost poke control own this window — your void-shield scaling don't answer them at the level-6 breakpoint yet. Farm what's safe and let the next spike re-price the lane.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: On first item the numbers lean his way — the wall-frost poke control out-tick your void-shield scaling in even exchanges. Don't bleed for pride; take the trades his cooldowns hand you.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Three items, level 16: you are the endgame — blink through their team, silence the carry, and repeat every two seconds.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: At level 1 your void-shield scaling beat the stardust ramp control in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Aurelion Sol answer you, not the other way around.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Your void-shield scaling out-muscle Aurelion Sol's stardust ramp control at level 2 — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: E joins once spells fly — the slow wave covers your farm walks. Still: survive, stack, smile.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Your void-shield scaling out-muscle Aurelion Sol's stardust ramp control through levels 4-5 — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Riftwalk online — the map shrinks and the lane tax ends. One blink changes every gank, trade, and dive equation.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Your void-shield scaling out-muscle Aurelion Sol's stardust ramp control on first item — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: At two-plus items your void-shield scaling beat the stardust ramp control in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Aurelion Sol answer you, not the other way around.

phases.label: Level 3

phases.label: Levels 4-5

phases.label: Level 6

phases.label: First item
phases.why: On first item the numbers lean your way — void-shield scaling edge out the soldier-poke shuffle control when both sides play it straight. Press the small advantages: wave position, first poke, cooldown ticks.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Three items, level 16: you are the endgame — blink through their team, silence the carry, and repeat every two seconds.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Riftwalk online — the map shrinks and the lane tax ends. One blink changes every gank, trade, and dive equation.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: blink-strings start chunking. Take the trades you spent five levels refusing.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Three items, level 16: you are the endgame — blink through their team, silence the carry, and repeat every two seconds.
